title: 13-in-1 Painters Tool - Stainless Steel Multi Scraper Includes Roller, Straight and Curved Scrapers
features: [Multifunctional Putty Tool] - The 13-in-1 paint scraper for wood be used as a straight scraper, curved scraper, gouger, screwdriver, nail puller, can opener, hammer, roller cleaner, box opener, Allen wrench & more. The scrapers-painting & decorating tools replace multiple hand tools in your toolbox

[Premium Material] - The blade of polyfilla tool is made of 3CR13 stainless steel, with hardness up to HRC 30, which is corrosion-resistant and durable. With a mirrored polished finish for easy cleanup. This is a "buy once, use forever" kind of product

[Wide Application] - The multi-use paint scraper tool are suitable for home decoration and painting projects, such as applying joints, cleaning, putting putty, scraping paint, removing paint from rollers, removing loose putty, vinyl or paper wall coverings, cleaning cracks and gouges, pulling nails, opening bottles, spreading and more

[Portable & Convenient] - The thickness of blade is 2mm, which ensures the availability of the pocket utility scraper tool. The size of wallpaper scraper sharp is about 75 x 220 mm/ 2.95 x 8.7 inch, and weighs only 133 g, easy and convenient to carry and store

[Ergonomic Design] - There is a metal hammer cap on end of handle. Hallow design on the handle for easy storage. This multi tool scraper is equipped with a large rubber handle gives you a comfortable edge to grasp, and let you work with minimal effort
description: Product Description Wide Application The paint wallpaper scrapers for filling holes, smoothing cracks in wood, plaster, masonry and wallpaper scrapers paper to create that smooth finish.
